2.t: the Sustainer of all that exists

25.t: And will be paid in full

50.t: and so that I make lawful

57.t: then He will grant them in full

75.t: with a great amount of wealth

78.t: so that you may think it

152.t: so that He may test you

159.t: the ones who put trust (in Him)

185.t: you will be paid in full

195.t: and surely I will admit them
